top_signals.title: Treasury yields mixed as investors digest Warsh's first Fed meet
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was largely flat at 4.457%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Better internet, more pay: will Hormuz crisis improve life at sea?
top_signals.summary: Months stuck on stranded vessels have exposed mental and physical strains on shipping crews
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: The biggest PE loss since 2008
top_signals.summary: Thoma Bravo will lose all of the $5bn it invested in Medallia as it hands the software group to lenders
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wall Street pushes US regulators to further ease Basel capital rules
top_signals.summary: Banks press for further gains even after winning their largest lobbying victory since the financial crisis
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: What is the point of Berkshire Hathaway?
top_signals.summary: It can be bold — or become an index fund

top_signals.summary: In the Makerfield by-election, Andy Burnham is trying to win over an area that voted heavily for Leave

top_signals.title: SpaceX adds longtime Elon Musk ally Roelof Botha to board
top_signals.summary: Roelof Botha, who worked with Elon Musk at PayPal in the dot-com era before becoming a prominent venture capitalist, is joining the SpaceX board.
